query:
-- Buscar dados de atividades do Gabriel (biel2s7777@gmail.com)
SELECT u.name, u.email, ad.*
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN atividades_diarias ad ON u.id = ad.corretorId
WHERE u.email = 'biel2s7777@gmail.com'
ORDER BY ad.data DESC
LIMIT 5;
